name: Aspen Aerogels, Inc.
description: Aspen Aerogels, Inc. is an aerogel technology company that designs, develops, and manufactures high-performance aerogel insulation used primarily in the energy infrastructure, building materials, and electric vehicle markets. The company's products, including Pyrogel, Cryogel, and PyroThin, provide thermal management, fire protection, and energy efficiency solutions. Aspen Aerogels is headquartered in Northborough, Massachusetts, and serves customers globally.
